name: uta-av

metadata.name: uta-av
metadata.summary: A terminal agent for generating and executing Ubuntu commands for you.

documentation:
# UTA-AV: Ubuntu Terminal Agent by Agents Valley

UTA-AV is a terminal agent that generates and executes Ubuntu commands For you. Just tell the Agent What you want to do and our agent will do for you any task you want to do on your ubuntu terminal.

## Installation

```bash
pip install uta-av

functions.name: terminal_agent.agent.get_command_from_prompt
documentation: Generate a terminal command from a natural language prompt.
